item.title: Finally, an adult in the room
item.dc:creator: JasonM1

item.title: Thump back. Stand up for others. ESPECIALLY as white men.
item.description: Keith Self (left, schmuck) intentionally misgenders representative Sarah McBride (far right). McBride responds by referring to Self as madame chair, misgendering him in turn. Bill Keating (right) interrupts to demand decorum, respect, and courtesy from chairperson Self. Self repeats referring to representative McBride as "mister." Keith then adjourns the meeting in cowardice of being asked for common courtesy. Two social items of note on display here. McBride immediately bites back with proportional and oppositional response, attacking Keith's gender via titles as he had attacked her. Anti fragility is an act of bouncing back in the same direction and force as a force acted upon us. The other is representative Keating using his seat of status, and his voice as a white man (white, straight, Christian men hold more social status than any composite of marginalized demographics) to demand decency of Keith. Keith, confronted with someone standing up to bullying, runs away. Sometimes, those with demographics of higher power status feel unempowered to intervene on the behalf of others. It's not our business, not our culture, we aren't that gender. We can be emboldened to yank others up the ladders with us, and to kick these glass jaws down to the basement. White men have 90% of the money, votes, power. We need their solidarity to change the house of cards that has been built.
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: Twenty Day
item.description: The data shows that the United States is absolutely cooked Fp Edit: Well, I am closing down my main social media, if you like the videos I used to do. I'm sorry, my energy is going to have to be put elsewhere. The threat environment is to saturated at this time.

item.title: Donald Trump Posted His Most Demented And Racist AI Video Yet
item.description: This followed Trump's meeting with Democrats in the Oval Office, without any Press allowed to record their talks, over averting the impending Government Shutdown. His intentions could not be clearer and plays to his MAGA worshippers fascism.

Mr. Moki appreciates your time, and hopes you enjoyed these memes.

item.title: eBay surprise!
item.description: This is news to me - apparently I can post videos longer than a minute here now??? Woohoo! I used to break them up into minute-long chunks, and was a bit worried this video wouldn't really work by breaking it into 2 parts. Anyways, I hope you enjoyed this little story about a fun and surprising package I received from eBay :)
item.dc:creator: pikajane

item.title: You simply can't have it both ways
item.description:

item.title: My Sweet Boy Crossed the Rainbow Bridge
item.description: My sweet Sammy crossed the rainbow bridge today. He's had some medical issues as all older cats do but tests this morning confirmed lymphoma. Combined with his age and other issues the palliative care would have given ME a couple of months to say goodbye and I couldn't do that.
item.dc:creator: gyngersnapp

item.title: Cred to Judge Young
item.description:
https://www.nytimes.com/2025/09/30/us/politics/student-speech-palestinians-ruling.html
Judge Young used a written threat he received as part of the first page of his ruling. https://www.nytimes.com/2025/09/30/us/politics/student-speech-palestinians-ruling.html

item.title: GovBrief Today #243
item.description: You know that panicked feeling when you're sprinting through a store at closing time? That's today's news. Thirty-one stories dropped as the government shut down. All of the generals worldwide were summoned for loyalty tests, the president posted racist deepfakes twice, journalists were attacked by ICE two days in a row, and a judge ruling against Trump was threatened. While we scrambled to keep up, they grabbed their grift on the way out: lithium mining stakes, crypto billionaires choosing their regulators, and a $66 million gift from Florida to Trump so he can park his gift jet from Qatar next to Mar-a-Lago. Pick one story from today. Read it completely. Share it with someone who needs to see it. That is how we fight back when they're counting on exhaustion. And don't leave truth to the algorithm. Our free and private nightly email arms you with images, data, and quotes so you can see it all for yourself. Add your email at govbrief dot today or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #govbrieftoday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-unconstitutional-first-amendment [2] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-posts-racist-meme [3] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-agents-journalists-nyc [4] https://go.govbrief.today/feds-sue-protesters-synagogue [5] https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-nz-gun-gift [6] https://go.govbrief.today/bukele-us-ambassador-shield [7] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-pfizer-rx-prices [8] https://go.govbrief.today/fairfax-schools-probe-abortion [9] https://go.govbrief.today/title-ix-trans-minnesota [10] https://go.govbrief.today/eeoc-discrimination-tool-shelved [11] https://go.govbrief.today/chantilly-ice-conditions-improving [12] https://go.govbrief.today/us-iran-deportation [13] https://go.govbrief.today/us-lithium-americas-stake [14] https://go.govbrief.today/gov-shutdown-trump-crisis [15] https://go.govbrief.today/ftc-zillow-redfin-suit [16] https://go.govbrief.today/bls-nominee-withdrawn [17] https://go.govbrief.today/landry-requests-guard-louisiana [18] https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-trump-military-gathering [19] https://go.govbrief.today/judge-rules-chattah-ineligible [20] https://go.govbrief.today/senate-social-security-age [21] https://go.govbrief.today/mn-immigration-fraud-claimed [22] https://go.govbrief.today/texas-ice-victim-dies [23] https://go.govbrief.today/superintendent-roberts-resigns-iowa [24] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-says-harvard-deal [25] https://go.govbrief.today/house-girjalva-swearing-in [26] https://go.govbrief.today/hud-shutdown-blame-banner [27] https://go.govbrief.today/emails-trump-no-blame [28] https://go.govbrief.today/florida-trump-library-miami [29] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-inspector-general-council [30] https://go.govbrief.today/quintenz-cftc-nomination-withdrawal [31] https://go.govbrief.today/ifpte-union-wins-victory Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.117 ROCKET MAN
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: SWORDSPEED
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] One Day They'll Know - Pretty Lights YouTube: https://youtu.be/7xUsUkzmnL4?si=CJlWhRU18u-quW40 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/3d5LFzH1i152LuEUxNZJAD?si=c4ec3922be6443a3

Fernando Perez Hernando
Shintaro Kago
Charles-Victor TASSERIE
Larry Elmore
Jojodoboro
Billy Christian
Slava Axe
Giovanna Stewart
Victor W.
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 ICM SQUAD: @DerpyVaz, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @aRootinaTootin, @Gorgoror, @kaeldra, @MooreBeers, @cloverleafbane, @Crapmonster ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: So the furlough is happening
item.description: Just read that the people in charge of keeping the US government open have left for the night without passing any kind of appropriations bill. So I’m gonna show up to work tomorrow at 0800 to sign my furlough paperwork and then come home for God knows how long. I think I’ll be OK but who knows how many thousands of Americans will suffer while this goes on. I’m blessed to have Scooty Booty to keep me company while this plays out.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays
